form_name: O2C - Intra_Intercompany Invoice - Transport documents Management

questions.text: Which of the following transport documents is required when handling dangerous goods?
Which feature allows SAP to generate one invoice per truck for specific cases?
options: Billing Split and Convergence for Freight Orders
Invoice consolidation based on customer feedback

questions.text: How does the system handle multiple sales orders for the same sold-to party in SAP?
options: It generates a separate invoice for each order by default
It groups them into one billing document based on sold-to party, billing date, and billing type
It only generates invoices upon manual approval
It requires the creation of separate proforma invoices for each order

questions.text: What is required to trigger a billing document in NEO after Post Goods Issue (PGI)?
Which billing document is created after PGI in a standard sales order flow?
